'''''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 155''' is the one hundred fifty-fifth issue of the ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly]]'' series of comic reprints, published in [[April]] [[1982]].

This issue includes one of the few original comic stories in the series, "[[Dark Lord's Conscience]]". It was later reprinted and colorized in [[Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds 1|''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds'' 1]].

==Contents==
*"[[Dark Lord's Conscience]]"
*[[Star Wars (1977) 56|''Star Wars'' (1977) 56]] {{C|Part 2}}
*"Killraven: Warrior of Mars"

==Sources==
*<!-- 2021-09-23 -->''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''
